62fdc240c76481561474a8c0.leadin_sanitized: The protagonist catches malaria after a trip to the Colosseum with Giovanelli. For 10 points each:
parts: Identify this novella, in which the title character meets Winterbourne and eventually dies of “Roman Fever.”
This author of Daisy Miller wrote about Isabel Archer in The Portrait of a Lady and about Christopher Newman’s failed attempt to woo Claire in The American.
In this Henry James novella, Mrs. Grose tells the tale of siblings Miles and Flora and their encounter with ghosts of the former housekeeper Miss Jessel and her lover Peter Quint.
